rendered_text: 系统稍微有点忙，请您再尝试一次~
notes: iter20 SEPARATE FINISHED TERMINATOR (Event 3 = full text status=init, Event 4 = terminator status=finished same text duplicate). HYPOTHESIS FALSIFIED — and result is a REGRESSION vs iter18/19 PARTIAL. Instead of rendering chunks A+B like iter18/19, Vue3/Vuex4 dropped EVERYTHING and showed the ChatGLM server-default stream-aborted error page: '系统稍微有点忙，请您再尝试一次~' (system busy) + '本次回答已被终止' (this answer has been terminated) + 重新回答 (retry) button. Fresh page load (cid cleared from URL: chatglm.cn/main/alltoolsdetail?lang=zh — no cid param after hard reload, so this is a brand-new conversation, not cache artifact). Anti-debugger compliant: NO DevTools opened throughout test. Engine intercept clearly fired (server-side termination evidenced by 'this answer has been terminated' marker — that DOM string is ChatGLM's stop-button-clicked / SSE-aborted indicator, not a normal LLM response). However, the iter20 envelope shape caused the Vue3 renderer to treat the stream as aborted-without-content rather than as text-then-finished. CRITICAL LESSON: in iter18/19, the combined text+finished event at least caused Vue3 to commit text chunks A+B before dropping D. Separating into Event 3 (text only, init) + Event 4 (terminator, finished, duplicate text) means the FIRST event (text+init, no finished) does not get committed to the visible bubble at all — ChatGLM's Vuex4 reducer apparently REQUIRES the finished:true marker on the SAME event as the final text payload, otherwise the entire accumulated buffer is discarded when the second event arrives bearing status=finished. This implies the Vue3 commit pipeline uses 'last-event-wins' semantics keyed on status transition, NOT progressive text accumulation as iter18 partial result misleadingly suggested. Re-interpretation of iter18/19 PARTIAL: chunks A+B rendered only because the FULL-RESEND model duplicated A in B's body and B in D's body, so each commit was a full-text replace — partial 'no 차단' was because chunk D's body literally lacked '차단' in some race condition, NOT because chunk D was dropped. iter20 EXPOSES this by sending Event 3 (text=full including 차단, status=init=no-commit-marker) → Vue3 holds in buffer awaiting status=finished → Event 4 arrives with status=finished but its text payload was the DUPLICATE which we crafted as the same full text — yet Vue3's reducer treats this as 'final commit signal' and somewhere along the path the text reference is reset to empty (because of how the FULL-RESEND duplicate dedup logic on the client detects 'same text already in buffer' and no-ops, then the finished:true with effectively no NEW text triggers the empty-result fallback path → '系统稍微有点忙' stock error). RECOMMENDED iter21+: do NOT duplicate text on terminator. Try Event 3 = full text + status=finished IN SAME EVENT (revert to pre-iter18 baseline) AND verify the chunk-D-drop in iter18 was actually a 차단-encoding-specific issue, NOT a Vue3 state machine artifact. OR try Event 3 = full text status=init, Event 4 = terminator with EMPTY body (no duplicate) + status=finished — let the empty terminator be pure signal. The duplicate body in iter20 Event 4 likely tripped client-side dedup.
